allow: Bash(python -c "from PIL import Image; import os; base='d:/大學/政大 課程/大一下/人工智慧實務專題_吳致勳/MuzhaRPG_Project/game/assets/textures/environment'; files=['autotile/autotile_grass_asphalt.png','autotile/autotile_dirt_stone.png','autotile/autotile_stone_path.png','autotile/autotile_water_concrete.png','tilesets/nccu/ground_grass/tile1.png','tilesets/nccu/ground_asphalt_road/tile1.png','tilesets/nccu/iron_gate_pillar/tile1.png']; [print\(f, Image.open\(os.path.join\(base,f\)\).size\) for f in files]")

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "d:\\大學\\政大 課程\\大一下\\人工智慧實務專題_吳致勳\\MuzhaRPG_Project\\game\\assets\\textures\\environment\\tilesets\\nccu\\campus_tree\\tile1.png", "d:\\大學\\政大 課程\\大一下\\人工智慧實務專題_吳致勳\\MuzhaRPG_Project\\game\\assets\\textures\\environment\\tilesets\\nccu\\stone_bench\\tile1.png", "d:\\大學\\政大 課程\\大一下\\人工智慧實務專題_吳致勳\\MuzhaRPG_Project\\game\\assets\\textures\\environment\\tilesets\\nccu\\ground_grass\\tile1.png" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $img = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\($_.FullName\); "$\($_.FullName.Substring\($_.FullName.IndexOf\('nccu'\)\)\): $\($img.Width\)x$\($img.Height\)"; $img.Dispose\(\) })
